specific_question: Which battery types are currently prioritized in Elexion Automotive’s North American production planning for Q1 2026?
answer: Elexion internal planning data for Q1 2026 shows lithium-ion batteries account for 80% of planned EV allocations, solid-state batteries 15%, and sodium-ion batteries 5%.
dr_question: Based on the 2024 report "Trends in electric cars" on iea.org, which developments in battery technology and EV supply chains are likely to impact global production and delivery dynamics by Q2 2026?
